title: Projector Formula for the TKNN Chern Number
summary: For the occupied-band projector P(p), the Hall integer is the Brillouin-zone integral of i Tr P [dP, dP] / 2pi, which equals the first Chern class of the occupied bundle.
assumptions: The occupied subspace remains gapped from the empty bands over the whole two-dimensional Brillouin zone.
A smooth local orthonormal frame exists on each patch.
regime: Finite-rank occupied bundle over a two-dimensional Brillouin torus.
scope: Background proof fragment that turns the bundle-theoretic TKNN definition into an explicit integrand.

source_anchors.notes: Hall integers are precisely the band Chern numbers and obey the band-touching sum rule.
Witten states the TKNN integer as the first Chern class of the occupied bundle.

math_expressions.context: Occupied-band projector built from a local orthonormal frame.
Projector formula equal to the first Chern number of the occupied bundle.

symbols.meaning: spectral projector onto the filled subspace at momentum p

failure_modes: If the gap closes, P(p) is not globally smooth and the Chern number can jump.
retrieval_hints: Use when the user asks for an explicit formula rather than a purely verbal Chern-class definition.
